member.name: T:ThunderKit.Markdown.Extensions.Json.JsonFrontMatterExtension
member.summary: Extension to discard a YAML frontmatter at the beginning of a Markdown document.

member.name: T:ThunderKit.Markdown.Extensions.Json.JsonFrontMatterRenderer.FrontMatter
member.summary: Pre-Defined FontMatter for ThunderKit Documentation files

member.name: F:ThunderKit.Markdown.Extensions.Json.JsonFrontMatterRenderer.FrontMatter.pageStylePath
member.summary: Stylesheet to load into root MarkdownElement

member.name: F:ThunderKit.Markdown.Extensions.Json.JsonFrontMatterRenderer.FrontMatter.headerClasses
member.summary: Classes to apply to JsonFrontMatter rendered Header container

member.name: F:ThunderKit.Markdown.Extensions.Json.JsonFrontMatterRenderer.FrontMatter.title
member.summary: Title to display in Header's Label setting title enables the display of the Page Header

member.name: F:ThunderKit.Markdown.Extensions.Json.JsonFrontMatterRenderer.FrontMatter.titleClasses
member.summary: Classes to apply to the Title label in the header

member.name: F:ThunderKit.Markdown.Extensions.Json.JsonFrontMatterRenderer.FrontMatter.iconClasses
member.summary: Classes to apply to the Icon VisualElement in the page Header

member.name: F:ThunderKit.Markdown.Extensions.Json.JsonFrontMatterRenderer.FrontMatter.contentUrl
member.summary: When specified, a MarkdownElement is added to the end of the current MarkdownElement with its Source set to the provided value

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Markdown.UIElementRenderer.WriteOptimizedLeafBlock(Markdig.Syntax.LeafBlock)
member.returns: true if constructed optimized label, otherwise false

member.name: M:ThunderKit.Markdown.UIElementRenderer.WriteAttributes(Markdig.Renderers.Html.HtmlAttributes,UnityEngine.UIElements.VisualElement)
member.param: A class filter used to transform a class into another class at writing time
